title: orthocarpus tenuifolius
intro: Orthocarpus tenuifolius, also known as slender bird's beak or mountain lover's cup, is a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of the western United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been attributed to its alkaloid and phenolic compounds. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as soothing respiratory issues and reducing fever, making it a popular remedy for colds and flu. Orthocarpus tenuifolius can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional herbal remedies.
